reviews.review_msg: he gives you the answers to his midterms in a canvas announcement the week before exams and midterms, they are labelled as "last year's exams." They're 99% recycled USE THE INFO and also do the readings. he LOVES details. very easy grader, not hard to get an A

I took 271 & 282 with Bob. He has a mean face and his tone may come off as condescending at times. However, he is actually nice and really helpful when you reach out to him. Important thing to know is that unless you are going above and beyond, you are not getting anything past a B+. Meeting all the criteria does not ensure an A in his class.
nice guy, never taking another course with him though. lab assignments were worth 50% of your grade and the marking was completely arbitrary

Bryn is very nice and you can tell he loves this subject. However, his grading is very tough and nonsensical, lost points for making the reports look more professional, and from adding details that I add to reports at my actual CRM job. The labs are very fun but seem to be thrown together last minute and him and the TA are often scrambling.
seems like a nice guy,. lab assignment instructions weren't very clear (Quizzes were easy). it's his first class so hopefully he learns.

labs poorly organized and not thought through, often felt last minute and like he had no idea what was going on, not open to feedback and rude when students asked about grades. It is his first class taught at this university, so maybe he'll mellow out in the next little bit, but I would not take another course with him.

Whatever you do, don't take his course; if you don't attend the lectures, he'll think you're skipping class every time, and he'll assume you're attending the lab sessions rather than participating in his lectures.

Bob is a funny guy, most people compare him to Eeyore based on his demeanour. I took this class in the summer so it was a bit odd, but overall he is a really nice prof and tries to make his lectures interesting. if you can take a class with him i highly recommend it hes very knowledgeable and has been around a while, he knows what hes talking about

Bob is a great lecturer. Many struggle to see the charm and passion through the monotone voice but he genuinely cares about everyone doing well in his class. He does often look down when lecturing and does warn his students about this which I think is perfectly fine as he is more focused on conveying the material in a clear and understandable way.
